author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 4e39111. SourceEncoding {Utf8, Utf8Bom, Utf16Le, Utf16Be} in new ripsed-fs encoding module — std-only (encoding_rs can't ENCODE UTF-16; String::from_utf16 + str::encode_utf16 cover both directions). Linchpin: is_binary() exempts UTF-16 BOMs — UTF-16 files were previously misclassified as binary (NUL bytes) and never discovered at all. read_file_with_encoding -> write_atomic_encoded / stage_encoded carry encoding read-to-write across file/script/json modes (json content cache now (String, SourceEncoding)) and the facade. UTF-8 BOM stripped before matching (line-1 anchors work), re-attached on write. UndoRecord.encoding optional tag (absent=UTF-8, old logs parse unchanged) makes undo byte-exact for UTF-16. Truncated UTF-16/unpaired surrogates -> clean per-file InvalidData, other files proceed. 17 new tests. 23 suites green, clippy/fmt clean. Non-goals held: no charset guessing, no BOM-less UTF-16.
